notes:
EX-era set (English release 2007-02-14, 108 cards; Bulbapedia). BOOSTER STRUCTURE: 9 cards/pack, 36 packs/box, NO ETB (etb=null). Bulbapedia Booster-pack page: 'Beginning with the e-Card Series and continuing through the entirety of the EX Series, boosters had only 9 cards', 'at least 1 Rare card, generally 3 Uncommon cards, and the remainder are Common', plus 'one Reverse-Holo ... has been included in every booster', and 'A Booster Box contains 36 booster packs'. Modeled (matching the dataset's ex-firered-leafgreen precedent): 4 common + 3 uncommon + 1 reverse-holo + 1 rare-or-better = 9.

AVAILABLE BUCKETS (given): {rare-holo:19, rare:15, uncommon:31, common:32, ex:8, gold-star:3}. This set has NO secret-rare bucket (correct: Power Keepers has zero secret rares; Bulbapedia lists rarities Common/Uncommon/Rare/Rare Holo/Rare Holo ex/Rare Holo Star only). The 3 Gold Stars are Flareon 100/108, Jolteon 101/108, Vaporeon 102/108 (Bulbapedia).

RARE-OR-BETTER SLOT resolves across {rare, rare-holo, ex, gold-star} — sums to exactly 1.0:
  - ex = 0.167 (~6 ex per 36-pack box). Power Keepers is the famously most-GENEROUS ex-era set for hits. Elite Fourum pull-rate thread (Power-Keepers-specific community sample): 'the earlier e-series sets and Power Keepers you could get 5-7 ex per box' (mean ~6/box = 6/36 = 0.167). Flipside Gaming (aggregating Pokebeach/Pokegym) places the generous end of the ex band at a '1:8-12 pack rate' and names ex Power Keepers as the standout exception; 0.167 sits at/just above that generous end, consistent with the direct per-box sample. NOT inflated — it is the directly-sampled per-box figure for this specific set.
  - gold-star = 0.0417 (~1.5 per 36-pack box). Flipside Gaming: Power Keepers gold stars appeared 'significantly more frequently, with reports ranging from 1-2 per booster box', whereas most ex-era sets ran ~1:72 packs (1 per 2 boxes) / IndoorGameBunker '~1 per 88 packs'. Midpoint 1.5/box = 1.5/36 = 0.0417 used — Power Keepers is the explicit exception, so the per-box 1-2 figure (not the 1:72 era average) is applied.
  - rare-holo = 0.333 (~12 holos per box, ~1:3 packs). EX-era convention ~1:3 holo rate; same value used in the dataset's ex-firered-leafgreen config.
  - rare (plain non-holo) = remainder = 1 - 0.167 - 0.333 - 0.0417 = 0.4583.

REVERSE-HOLO SLOT: per dataset convention, EX-era reverse-holo filler is modeled with the plain common/uncommon pools (market value is what matters). Common:32 / uncommon:31 are near-equal, so a neutral 50/50 split is used. Sums to 1.0.

CONFIDENCE: 'low' — no large published per-set pull-rate STUDY exists for this 2007 vintage set. The ex figure is a Power-Keepers-specific COMMUNITY per-box sample (Elite Fourum), and the gold-star/holo figures are sourced era/community rates with the documented Power-Keepers generosity exception (Flipside). Vintage sealed Power Keepers boxes carry a heavy collector premium, so EV/booster will sit far below box price — expected; rates are NOT inflated to compensate.

INTEGRITY: every slot sums to exactly 1.0; all distribution keys {common, uncommon, rare, rare-holo, ex, gold-star} are a strict subset of this set's available buckets; no secret-rare used (set has none). No invented per-set percentages — ex from the Elite Fourum 5-7/box sample, gold-star from Flipside's 1-2/box exception, holo from the ex-era ~1:3 convention.
